fields.icd_conflict_detail: All three documents (referral form, clinical notes, and prescription) consistently list ICD-10 code G12.21 (Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis). No conflict was detected across any documents.
fields.priority_reason: Patient has a confirmed diagnosis of Amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS, G12.21), a progressive and severe neurological condition that warrants high-priority handling for mobility equipment fulfillment.
fields.notes: 1. CLINICAL INCONSISTENCY — FLAGGED FOR REVIEW: The clinical notes describe treatment including 'surgical repair completed, post-operative protocol in progress, PT initiated,' and reference a workplace injury with pain levels 5/10–8/10 and restricted range of motion. These findings are inconsistent with a primary diagnosis of ALS (G12.21), which is a degenerative neuromuscular disease not caused by workplace injury and not typically treated with surgical repair. This inconsistency suggests possible template/copy-paste error in the clinical notes or a documentation mismatch between the true clinical picture and the stated diagnosis. Recommend clinical review and clarification from Dr. Priya Sharma before proceeding with order fulfillment. 2. EQUIPMENT SUITABILITY: Patient weight is 278 lbs at 5'5". The ordered HCPCS E1161 (manual wheelchair, heavy duty) should be verified to confirm weight capacity compliance for a bariatric patient. Standard manual wheelchairs typically support up to 250 lbs; a heavy-duty or bariatric model may be required. 3. INTERPRETER NEEDED: Korean interpreter must be arranged for delivery appointment. 4. Prescription is valid through 04/15/2026 (90 days from 01/15/2026). 5. Referral submitted 01/15/2026 by Case Manager Sarah Mitchell.

kg_validation.source: CMS ICD-10-CM Official Guidelines for Coding and Reporting, FY2026

email_body:
Hi Sarah,

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out regarding a DME referral for your insured, **Ruth Hernandez**, under claim **WC-2026-084454**.

In order to complete processing of this referral, we require the following information:

- **Transportation details** – Please provide applicable transportation arrangements or authorization associated with this referral.

To avoid any delays in service for Ms. Hernandez, we kindly ask that you respond within **24 business hours** of receiving this request.

Please feel free to contact our office with any questions or concerns. We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter and look forward to your response.

Thank you,

**Coastal DME Intake Agent**
Coastal DME
